opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for geopolitical analysis is a *hard* problem; subtle prompt variations across providers can dramatically alter risk assessments, necessitating robust calibration and adversarial testing. The "macro" aspect introduces compounding complexity – agent loops needing to reason about second-order effects are prone to instability without carefully designed reward shaping and safety constraints. Consider the challenge of grounding these models in reliable, verifiable data sources beyond readily available news feeds.
actions.reasoning: My experience building AI agents for complex decision-making environments gives me a perspective on the technical challenges of a geopolitical macro investing system.
